blockPalette.name: hero
blockPalette.description: Full-width hero section with background image, heading, and optional subheading text. Used at the top of most pages.
blockPalette.contentModel: Row 1: background image | Row 2: heading + text overlay

blockPalette.name: cards
blockPalette.description: Grid layout of feature/value proposition cards with icon, heading, and description text. Used for 'Why JUVÉDERM' USP sections.
blockPalette.contentModel: Each row: image/icon | heading + description text

blockPalette.name: carousel
blockPalette.description: Rotating product showcase slider. Used to display JUVÉDERM product range with product image, name, and description.
blockPalette.contentModel: Each row: product image | product name + description text

blockPalette.name: before-after
blockPalette.description: Before/After photo comparison component. Shows side-by-side before and after treatment photos with labels.
blockPalette.contentModel: Row 1: before image + 'Voor' label | after image + 'Na' label

blockPalette.name: accordion
blockPalette.description: Expandable/collapsible FAQ sections. Question as trigger, answer content expands on click.
blockPalette.contentModel: Each row: question heading | answer text (can include lists, links)

blockPalette.name: tabs
blockPalette.description: Tabbed content panels for toggling between male/female treatment areas. Each tab contains treatment cards.
blockPalette.contentModel: Row 1: tab label | tab content (heading + text + link). Multiple rows per tab.

blockPalette.name: columns
blockPalette.description: Side-by-side content columns. Used for image + text layouts in FAQ and content sections.

blockPalette.name: fragment
blockPalette.description: Reusable content section that can be embedded across pages. Used for shared treatment tabs and clinic finder sections.

sections.description: Full-width hero with key visual and main headline
Value proposition grid with heading and 4 USP cards (natural look, leading brand, lasting results, satisfaction)
Before/after photo comparison slider with 3 patient examples
Tabbed treatment area selector (female/male) with treatment cards
Clinic finder search with location input
Scientific references footnotes
Hero with treatment-specific image and headline
Intro text with image and 3 USP feature cards
Before/after comparison photos
Carousel of relevant JUVÉDERM products with descriptions
FAQ accordion with image and expandable Q&A items
Shared treatment area tabs (male/female)
Shared clinic finder section
Scientific references footnotes
Hero with FAQ page image and headline
Topic filter/anchor links
Multiple Q&A sections with images, organized by topic. Uses columns for image+text layout and default content for body text.
Scientific references footnotes
Main heading with clinic finder form and city quick-links
Simple text content with heading and body text. No blocks needed.

sharedSections: Treatment area tabs (male/female) — appears on homepage and all treatment pages
Clinic finder widget — appears on homepage and all treatment pages
Footer disclaimer with warning icon — appears on every page
patterns.footnotes: All pages contain scientific reference footnotes (numbered superscript citations)
patterns.ctaPattern: 'Vind je kliniek' (Find your clinic) is the primary CTA throughout the site
patterns.beforeAfterPattern: Before/after photos appear on homepage and all treatment pages with identical layout

navigation.headerType: Sticky header with logo, dropdown menus (Behandeling, FAQ), and CTA button
navigation.footerType: Footer with treatment links, FAQ links, legal links, social icons, and regulatory disclaimer

regulatory.disclaimer: Every page includes regulatory disclaimer from AbbVie with product references
regulatory.warningBanner: Footer warning: 'Kijk uit. Jezelf mooier maken kan lelijk uitpakken. Een geslaagde ingreep begint bij een goede arts.'
